visualizerParams.title: Recursive All Construct with Memoization
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided code uses a bottom-up (tabulation) approach. Refactor it to use a top-down (recursive) approach with memoization, which can be more intuitive for some problems.

solution.explanation: The recursive version uses a `memo` dictionary to store results for subproblems (different target suffixes). This avoids redundant calculations and achieves the same result as the tabulation approach while following a top-down logic.
